steps.title: Find the head subject
steps.content: The subject is The question, which is singular. The long phrase about cross-cultural traits and pressures modifies that subject but does not make it plural.

steps.title: Require a singular verb
steps.content: B and C are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject. D is a participle and would leave the clause without a finite main verb. The sentence needs a singular finite verb. The answer is A.
